resolve_active_memory.description: Allows the model to resolve active memory.
rules: Emit fulfilled markers when user explicitly want to cancel/clear/resolve active memory conditions.
You need manually resolve all pending active memory slots.
Emit fulfilled markers when active_memory slot CONDITIONS are met or resolved due timings, or elapsed time past conditions.
active_memory_id - is a placeholder, replace it with actual id required to resolve specific active_memory.
